sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n51206" key="i)so/fwton" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἰσό-φωτον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, name of an <sense id="n51206.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">eyesalve</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0718.tlg007:112" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aët.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.112</biblScope> </bibl> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">109</biblScope> </bibl> Lat. vers.).</sense> </entryFree>
